codeReview.summary: The theme preference service implementation is well-structured and fully satisfies the validation assertion VAL-LIB-003. It provides Effect-based error handling using Either, persists to both localStorage and cookies, detects system theme preferences, and includes comprehensive test coverage (32 tests covering all functions).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly followed the project conventions documented in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md. The code uses 4-space indentation, single quotes for JS, Effect-based Either for error handling, and maintains backward compatibility with existing lib/ exports.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: resources/js/lib/theme.ts and resources/js/lib/index.ts follow the exact patterns established in storage.ts and cookies.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the procedure as documented in the worker-transcripts.jsonl. The skillFeedback.confirmed that followedProcedure is true with no deviations. The verification steps (npm run test:run, lint:check, format:check) all passed.
The worker used the standard commands from services.yaml (npm run test:run, npm run lint:check, npm run format:check). No additional services were started.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All commands run are documented in .factory/services.yaml

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker leveraged existing codebase knowledge appropriately - using the existing Effect-based Either pattern from storage.ts and cookies.ts, the existing preconditions (storage services and use-appearance.tsx hook already existed), and followed the established patterns for SSR safety.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: theme.ts imports from './storage' and './cookies' which provide the Either-based error handling pattern

summary: The theme-preference-service feature implementation is complete and passes all validation criteria. The worker created a well-designed Effect-based theme service with persistence to localStorage and cookies, system theme detection, and comprehensive test coverage. All verification commands passed (173 tests including 32 new theme tests). No blocking issues found.
